criteria.name: Reviewed Draft Status
criteria.requirement: Internal draft has review_completed_internal status and refinement applied.
criteria.failure_condition: Draft not reviewed or review incomplete.

criteria.name: Candidate Eligibility
criteria.requirement: Candidate is REF-CAND-0001 or REF-CAND-0002 with blocked publication status preserved.

criteria.name: Blueprint Alignment
criteria.requirement: Draft aligns to DRAFT-BLUEPRINT-0001 or DRAFT-BLUEPRINT-0002.

criteria.name: Section Contract Compliance
criteria.requirement: All required draft sections present per blueprint contract.

criteria.name: Reference Substance Readiness
criteria.requirement: Draft carries governed reference substance within word count bounds.

criteria.name: Definition and Scope Stability
criteria.requirement: Definitions and scope remain stable after review refinement.

criteria.name: Governance Boundary Strength
criteria.requirement: Governance boundary stronger than repository visibility.

criteria.name: Claim Scope Discipline
criteria.requirement: Claims remain internal governance scope only.

criteria.name: Source Scope Discipline
criteria.requirement: Source scope limited to repository governance documents.

criteria.name: Semantic SEO Restraint
criteria.requirement: Semantic SEO remains internal planning only.
criteria.failure_condition: Public metadata or SEO expansion implied.

criteria.name: Proposed Route Path Safety
criteria.requirement: Proposed path is inactive candidate path only.
criteria.failure_condition: Path exists as file, directory, or active route.

criteria.name: Active Route Registry Non-Conflict
criteria.requirement: Proposed path not in active route-registry.

criteria.name: Sitemap Non-Expansion
criteria.requirement: Proposed path not in sitemap.xml.

criteria.name: Public Metadata Non-Creation
criteria.requirement: No public metadata created for proposed paths.
criteria.failure_condition: Public title, meta, canonical, or schema exists.

criteria.name: Public Navigation Non-Creation
criteria.requirement: No public navigation links to proposed paths.
criteria.failure_condition: index.html or navigation links to candidate paths.

criteria.name: Structured Data Boundary
criteria.requirement: No public structured data deployment for proposed paths.
criteria.failure_condition: Schema on public surface for candidate paths.

criteria.name: Internal Link Plan Readiness
criteria.requirement: Internal link plan describes conceptual dependencies only.
criteria.failure_condition: Public hyperlink or route graph activation implied.

criteria.name: Forbidden Language Safety
criteria.requirement: No forbidden tool, classifier, upload, scoring, or verdict language in affirmative context.

criteria.name: Public Surface Safety
criteria.requirement: Draft remains non-site-public; no public readiness claims beyond inactive candidate eligibility.

criteria.name: Non-Authorization Strength
criteria.requirement: Non-authorization statement blocks routes, sitemap, metadata, navigation, publication, deployment, classifier, tool, upload.
